extraction.one_line_summary: MATTHEWS Michael won Stage 6 of 2019 Volta Ciclista a Catalunya (specific race details not provided in transcript, which primarily contains biographical/training interview content)
tactical_patterns: Matthews prioritized seated power training specifically for cobbled climbs, indicating targeted physiological adaptation rather than generic strength work.
Sunweb provided clearer leadership structure than Orica-GreenEDGE's multi-leader model, enabling more focused domestique support in decisive moments.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: mental coaching after 2018 spring crashes directly correlated with late-season wins, suggesting psychological preparation now equals physical preparation
